diagnosis.root_cause: Sections alternate between --apple-bg (#08080c) and #0a0a0f — virtually identical dark backgrounds. Card surfaces use rgba(255,255,255,0.02-0.035) with borders at rgba(255,255,255,0.05-0.06), making them invisible. Text throughout uses opacity values (0.20–0.45) that fail WCAG AA on any of these backgrounds. The hero is the only visually successful section because it uses vibrant gradient text and strong neon accents.
diagnosis.regression_from_iter2: Score dropped from 6.0 to 3.9 because ~80% of the page content became invisible. The hero improved (split typography, CTA) but all other sections became indistinguishable from the background.

strategy.approach: Fix contrast systemically by establishing a clear visual rhythm with alternating section backgrounds, visible card surfaces, and WCAG AA-compliant text colors. Preserve all hero improvements. Extend craft quality to every section.
priorities: 1. CONTRAST: Make every section visually distinct and readable
2. FUNCTIONALITY: All CTAs visible, all text readable, all viewports covered
3. RESPONSIVE: Fix mobile title truncation, text sizing, tablet grids
4. CRAFT: Extend hero-level quality to all sections
5. ORIGINALITY: Keep marquee, bento grid, split typography — just make them visible

spacing_sections.mobile_reduction: Section padding 64-80px on mobile via clamp

changes.why: Create visible contrast with the hero section's --apple-bg (#08080c). The 2 backgrounds were virtually identical.

Text at rgba(255,255,255,0.20-0.45) fails WCAG AA

Card features tags border: rgba(255,255,255,0.06) -> rgba(255,255,255,0.10)

changes.what: Slightly increase logo marquee text visibility

visual_rhythm.description: Create a clear alternating pattern so sections are visually distinct
pattern: Hero: --apple-bg (#08080c) — keeps the atmospheric neon glows
Offers: #08080c — dark reset, cards in #14142a, popular in #1e1e38

what_to_preserve: Hero split typography (MULTIPLIEZ / VOS CONVERSIONS / PAR 3.)
Neon amber/coral gradient accents on CTAs and headings
Bento grid asymmetric layout for services
Section header pattern (eyebrow + ghost text + bold text)
All Framer Motion entrance animations (whileInView, spring, stagger)
Multi-step contact form with price estimate
Hover glow effects on cards (just make cards visible first)

verification.contrast_check: Every piece of body text must be at minimum #a1a1aa on any background used. Titles must be #ffffff. Ghost text at minimum rgba(255,255,255,0.30).
verification.mobile_check: Title 'VOS CONVERSIONS' must not be truncated at 375px. All text minimum 14px on mobile.
verification.visual_check: Each section must be visually distinguishable when scrolling. Cards must have visible edges/surfaces.
verification.functional_check: All CTAs visible. Form fully usable. FAQ accordion works. Marquee runs.
